design_plan: rng=42; AIDA: Hero=Attention, ChatGPT vs Super context=Interest, OSWorld + news=Desire, CTA band=Action; hero max-width math=1120px -> 2–3 lines; grid-auto-flow:dense verified; competitors sweep ok; primary CTA black on paper contrast AA+
headline: Super vs ChatGPT — personal AI agents compared for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: ChatGPT is a world‑class general assistant evolving toward agents and task automation. Super is purpose‑built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer‑use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time.
